CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'Billing', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), Billing_Training_Call_Completed_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Billing_Training_Call_Completed_Stamp__c)), Billing_Training_Call_Completed_Stamp__c, Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Training_Call_Completed__c ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: Billing Training Call Completed
